label: Layer connection
description: Defines a connection from one planet layer to another. When stored inside ScenPart_PlanetLayer.connections, the XML element name is the target layer tag (keyField), which populates the tag field.

tag.label: Tag
tag.description: Target layer tag identifying which layer this connection leads to. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

fuelCost.label: Fuel cost
fuelCost.description: Fuel consumed when the player travels through this connection. Defaults to 0.

zoomMode.label: Zoom mode
zoomMode.description: Camera transition behavior when moving through this connection.
